description_long: This is an ornate, high-backed armchair with a classic Victorian or Baroque-inspired design. The frame is elaborately carved, especially along the crest rail and legs, featuring intricate scrollwork and floral motifs in a light, possibly gilded wood finish. The upholstery is a pale, silvery-gray fabric with deep button tufting on the backrest, giving it a plush and luxurious appearance. The seat cushion is thick and appears comfortable, with a subtle diamond-quilted pattern. The armrests are wide, padded, and elegantly curved, seamlessly blending into the frame. The legs are cabriole-style, with decorative carvings that match the upper frame, contributing to the chair's regal and sophisticated look.
description: A luxurious, high-backed armchair with ornate carved woodwork, pale tufted upholstery, and elegant curved armrests and legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved, padded armrest, thick seat cushion, and detailed carved frame along the side and leg.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the high, tufted backrest, wide seat, and symmetrical ornate carvings on the frame and legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and frame details seen in view 0, with visible seat and back contours.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain, upholstered back panel and the ornate crest rail, with carved details visible at the top.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, curved with carved wood frame
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, deeply tufted with ornate carved crest rail
